---
title: "Inventory Management App"
date: 2025-09-02
categories: [Python, Databases, API]
image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/3094041/pexels-photo-3094041.jpeg"
description: A Flask-based web application for managing inventory with create, update, search, delete, and print functionality.
---

![](https://images.pexels.com/photos/3094041/pexels-photo-3094041.jpeg){fig-align="center" width=100%}
*Photo: [cottonbro studio](https://www.pexels.com/@cottonbro) - pexels*

## Overview
The application provides the following functionality:

- add new products
- update product information
- search products
- delete products
- print inventory records


## Tools
Python, Flask, SQL, HTML, CSS


## More About:
[Github Repository](https://github.com/lmacakova/inventory_management_app)

---

[Live App](https://luciamacakova.pythonanywhere.com)
